description: Score representing news sentiment of a story focusing on corporate action announcements
Aggregate score (0-100) of positive event ratio vs. all non-neutral events for an entity over a 91-day rolling window
Score representing news sentiment for stories about venture activity, company events, mergers, acquisitions, and takeovers
Sentiment score for stories about earnings evaluations
Score representing news sentiment specializing in earnings release announcements
Event Novelty Score (0–100) representing how new or unique the news story is within a 24-hour window
Number of milliseconds between the first and current story in an event novelty chain
The number of days since a similar story was detected; measures time gap between current news and last similar event
Event Sentiment Score: score (0-100) measuring news sentiment for an entity in the story, higher is more positive
Global Event Novelty Score (0–100) across all providers, measuring how "new" a news story is within a 24-hour window
Number of milliseconds between the first and current story in a global event novelty chain
Number of days since the last similar globally-detected story; measures time gap between globally similar events
Numerical score representing analyst recommendation changes
Score (0–100) quantifying projected market impact of a news flash over the next two hours
Multi-classifier sentiment score for equities, reflecting aggregate tone for the most relevant companies in the story
Score representing sentiment in global equities news, specializing in positive and negative identification
Score representing sentiment for editorials/commentaries specifically on equity markets
Score (0-100) indicating how strongly related the entity is to the news story, with higher values showing greater relevance
Represents the total entity records published per news story; essentially, the number of distinct entities involved in the story
Order of the entity record within a news story, shows the position of the entity
Sentiment score between 0 and 100 representing the overall sentiment of the news story
Count of non-neutral events for an entity over a 91-day rolling window
